column1: Platform Limitations - Craigslist Recent Search Challenges
column11: SEARCH RESULTS SUMMARY: Attempted quick scan of Craigslist Treasure Coast and South Florida for posts in last 4 hours mentioning: epoxy flooring contractor maintenance handyman kitchen remodel garage floor property manager. Searched for: site:treasure.craigslist.org epoxy flooring contractor site:fortlauderdale.craigslist.org epoxy flooring site:craigslist.org epoxy flooring Florida site:craigslist.org Florida handyman contractor site:craigslist.org Florida kitchen remodel maintenance site:craigslist.org garage floor property manager "treasure coast craigslist" epoxy flooring contractor today Florida craigslist epoxy flooring contractor maintenance handyman. RESULTS: ZERO Craigslist posts found in search results. CHALLENGES: 1) Craigslist prevents search engine indexing of their listings especially recent posts (last 4 hours) 2) The site: operator may not work well with Craigslist domains 3) Brave search API may not index recent Craigslist posts effectively 4) Browser control service unavailable (error: No supported browser found - needs Chrome/Brave/Edge/Chromium) 5) Need direct access to Craigslist to search for posts but no automation tools available. RECOMMENDATION: Cannot perform automated Craigslist scans without browser access. Would need to manually visit treasure.craigslist.org sections: 1) /search/sss (for sale) search "epoxy" "flooring" "garage floor" 2) /search/ggg (gigs) search "contractor" "handyman" "maintenance" 3) /search/bbb (services) search "flooring" "contractor" "kitchen remodel" 4) /search/rea (real estate) search "property manager" and manually check post timestamps for last 4 hours.
